title: Mildly Nutty Ukrainian Mushroom Pilaf
description: A plant-based Ukrainian dish featuring coconut cream and mushrooms, served in an agave leaf vessel, perfect for a hangover cure. This nutty and snappy pilaf is a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Rinse the brown rice in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of agave nectar over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth, coconut cream, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped walnuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve in an agave leaf vessel.
Steam the pilaf using a mushimono steam method for 5 minutes before serving.
